response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video from 00:00 to 04:03 as introductory talk. 2. Identified song from 04:03 to 05:01 as "MIRAGE" by Takanashi Kiara. 3. Used search to find the lyrics for "MIRAGE" and included the full lyrics.
response.global_summary: Takanashi Kiara introduces her song "MIRAGE" and then performs it live for her audience.

scenes.description: The performer Takanashi Kiara talks to the audience about her musical journey and upcoming song.
Takanashi Kiara performs her original song "MIRAGE".
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
MIRAGE
Takanashi Kiara

ooh
hm
eh-ah
mirror's reflection, going under
confused obsession, i still wonder
if i was made for you, if i could only see
oh, please, oh
make me up, a new persona calculated
perfectly for you, pretending like it's all just
for me? don't think so, live life incognito
oh, i-i-i play god and yet i'm asking why
you never see what i want, what i need
oh, do you? (no, no) oh, do you? (no, woah-oh)
follow through, let you pursue, but now
you sold me on a mirage, i tore you up into shreds
i don't even know what to do with this mess
tell me the cost, sit, be good
play your part, my mirage (my mirage)
living with regrets, told ya i'd do anything (oh, yeah)
better left unsaid, thought i'd be the king
and queen of newfound p-a-a-aradise
i'm beggin' you to see, i'm you, you're all of me
it seems like everyone wants it, all around and 'round
running 'round and 'round, on and on
this cycle keep in' me captive, escape my way
you say i'm way too fragile and i'm just your perfect idol
break me, shape me, i
you never see what i want, what i need

follow through, let you pursue, but now

i don't even know what to do with this mess

mi-mi-mi-mi-mi-mirage, you
